[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A low-resolution, close-up image shows a skull-like face hovering above a blurred red-and-dark background, with large white text reading “DUH GUSTI” and a small yellow circular icon at the lower right.

Main Subject:
The central visual focus is a skull-shaped graphic with white outlines and dark interior shading, positioned near the top center. Beneath it, a partial figure or object appears in dark clothing with a white collar-like area, but details are unclear due to blur.

Setting:
The background looks dark and indistinct, with a reddish band or area behind the skull graphic. The scene appears to be a digital or edited image rather than a clear real-world setting.

Visual Details:
The skull graphic is white with dark shadowing, with dark eye sockets and a toothy mouth shape. The image is heavily pixelated and blurry. Large, bold, blocky white text with a black outline reads across the lower left area. The bottom right contains a small yellow circular icon with a green and blue interior shape, though the details are unclear. The overall lighting is dim, with high-contrast white elements (the skull and text).

Visible Text:
DUH GUSTI

Practical Summary:
The image combines a skull-like graphic with large white text across the bottom. It also includes a small yellow circular icon on the right, while the rest of the background and any person/object details are blurred.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
